metadata.short_desc: Management tools for AstrBot Skills and MCP servers
metadata.desc: Provides function tools and commands for managing AstrBot Skills and MCP servers, including skill lifecycle management, MCP server configuration management, and a built-in management skill.

diff_mode.hint: When enabled, AI must provide original text and replacement text as a diff pair when editing MCP configurations, instead of full config replacement. This prevents AI from accidentally overwriting the entire configuration. For Skill file editing, use AstrBot's new built-in file tools.

diff_match_threshold.hint: Percentage match required for MCP config original text matching. 100 means exact match required; lower values allow minor deviations in AI-provided original text. Only effective when Diff mode is enabled.
